SELECT 
    UserPreferenceElements, 
    RecommendedItemFeatures
FROM 
    UserPreferences

    ON UserPreferences.UserID = RecommendedItems.UserID
WHERE 
    UserPreferenceElements LIKE '%bravery%'

    OR UserPreferenceElements LIKE '%unique sound%' 
    OR UserPreferenceElements LIKE '%enjoyable experience%'
    AND RecommendedItemFeatures LIKE '%mix of rap and rock%' 
    OR RecommendedItemFeatures LIKE '%great party atmosphere%' 
    OR RecommendedItemFeatures LIKE '%classic songs%' 
    OR RecommendedItemFeatures LIKE '%unique style%';
